en.commentary:
I've spent more time than I care to admit comparing dishwashers, and the answer for 2026 is clear: the Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N earns first place because it wins every category that matters and loses only on price. At 38 dBA it is the quietest dishwasher most kitchens will ever hold. CrystalDry, which uses zeolite crystals to convert moisture into heat, finishes plastics fully dry in a single cycle — every other drying technology in this ranking, including ProDry and Dynamic Dry, leaves beads on Tupperware. PrecisionWash with PowerControl scans soil levels twice per cycle and routes intensified spray to the dirtiest items. Consumer Reports tested 280 models and put this one at the top of the list. That is the verdict, and the only legitimate reason to pick something else is the $1,999 price tag.

The Miele G 7156 SCVi takes second because Miele engineers its dishwashers to a 20-year design life — over 7,300 wash cycles documented in their internal specification. Spread $1,899 across two decades and the cost per year drops below $95, lower than any Bosch in this list when you factor in expected replacement cycles. AutoOpen drying cracks the door at the end of the cycle to evacuate humidity, which works on plastics nearly as well as CrystalDry without the upcharge. Buy this if you intend to keep your kitchen layout for the next 15 years.

The Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N at $1,499 is the most rational purchase for most readers. It carries the same CrystalDry technology as the Benchmark, the same third rack, the same Home Connect integration. The differences are 4 dB of additional noise (42 vs 38 dBA, both inaudible from the next room) and a slightly less aggressive water-softening cycle. For $500 saved, those concessions are easy to accept.

The rest of the field sorts predictably. The Bosch 500 Series and Miele G 5008 SCU represent the $1,000 to $1,100 sweet spot where build quality remains excellent and only marginal features fall away. The KitchenAid KDPM804KPS deserves its sixth-place finish for offering a genuinely useful third-rack jet system at a competitive price, though its reliability record sits a half-step below the German brands. The Bosch 300 Series SHEM63W55N at $849 wins the budget category outright: it is the cheapest dishwasher in this ranking and the only sub-$900 model I would install in my own kitchen without reservation.

highlights.title: The Bosch Benchmark earns its $1,999 price through CrystalDry alone
highlights.body: CrystalDry is the single feature that justifies the Benchmark's premium over every dishwasher below $1,500. The zeolite mineral inside the unit absorbs water vapor and releases heat, producing internal temperatures up to 176°F. Plastic containers, the consistent failure mode of every other drying technology, emerge dry. This is not a marginal improvement. If you wash plastic food storage daily, the time saved hand-drying or running a second cycle adds up across a 12-year ownership window to hundreds of hours. The Benchmark also gets you to 38 dBA, quiet enough to run during a phone call in the same room.

highlights.title: Miele's 20-year design life is real engineering, not marketing copy
highlights.body: Miele publishes the 20-year design life as an internal engineering specification, not a vague reliability claim. The company runs accelerated wash-cycle tests equivalent to 7,300 cycles before a model ships. The G 7156 SCVi uses stainless steel for every component that contacts water, including the spray arms and pump housing where competitors use plastic. The water softener built into the machine removes calcium that destroys heating elements in hard-water regions, which describes much of the United States. Across 20 years, you will replace any other dishwasher in this ranking at least once. The Miele math works.

highlights.title: The Bosch 800 Series is the right purchase for 90% of buyers
highlights.body: The Benchmark wins the ranking on technical merit but the 800 Series wins on rational economics. You get CrystalDry, PrecisionWash with PowerControl, third rack, and Home Connect for $500 less. The only meaningful concessions are 4 dB of additional noise — a difference most people cannot reliably hear in a normal kitchen — and an aesthetically different control panel. If your kitchen renovation budget is finite, allocate the saved $500 toward better cabinets or counters and install the 800 Series. The result is identical in 95% of daily use.

highlights.title: Skip LG and Café if reliability matters more than features
highlights.body: The LG LDFN4542S and Café CDT875P4NW2 both offer genuine selling points — LG's 10-year direct-drive motor warranty and Café's customizable designer hardware — but Yale Appliance's service-call data places both brands above Bosch and Miele in repair frequency during years three to seven of ownership. For a $900 to $1,800 appliance you expect to use for a decade or more, choosing on motor warranty alone undersells the value of brands that statistically need fewer repair visits. Both LG and Café are competent machines; neither is the right answer when reliability is the priority.

highlights.title: The Bosch 300 Series at $849 is the only honest budget recommendation
highlights.body: Most $700 to $900 dishwashers cut corners on the spray arm material, the tub finish, or the cycle programming logic. The Bosch 300 Series cuts corners on drying technology (no CrystalDry, no AutoOpen) and on the third rack design (smaller, fewer adjustment points). Every other component is identical to the Bosch lineup above it: stainless steel tub, PrecisionWash sensor cleaning, AquaStop leak protection, 44 dBA noise rating. Buy this for a rental property, a second kitchen, or a primary kitchen where the budget is firm at $900. It outperforms every other dishwasher under $1,000 I have evaluated.

zh-tw.commentary:
說真的，我看洗碗機看到都會背了。2026 年的答案很清楚：Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 拿第一是因為它在所有重要項目都贏，只在價格上輸給其他人。38 分貝是大部分廚房能買到的最安靜機種，比平常冰箱的運轉聲還小聲。CrystalDry 用沸石礦物吸收水氣再釋放熱量，把塑膠保鮮盒徹底烘乾，這件事其他烘乾技術做不到，包括 KitchenAid 的 ProDry 和 LG 的 Dynamic Dry，塑膠盒拿出來一定有水珠。PrecisionWash 加 PowerControl 雙噴臂在洗的過程中會掃描污垢程度，自動把強力水流導向最髒的那一邊。Consumer Reports 測了 280 款機型把這台放在第一名，這就是結論。要選別款唯一合理的理由就是 NT$65,000 的價格。

Miele G 7156 SCVi 拿第二，因為 Miele 設計的洗碗機從規格書就是要用 20 年，原廠內部測試做到 7,300 個洗滌循環。NT$62,000 分攤到 20 年，每年不到 NT$3,100，把預期更換週期算進去之後總成本比任何 Bosch 都低。AutoOpen 自動開門烘乾在循環結束時把門推開讓水氣散出，塑膠烘乾效果幾乎和 CrystalDry 同等級，但不用多付那筆錢。如果你打算這套廚房用 15 年以上，買 Miele 的長期帳會更划算。

Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N NT$49,000 才是大多數人最該買的那一台。同樣的 CrystalDry、同樣的第三層碗籃、同樣的 Home Connect 聯網，差別只在多 4 分貝噪音（42 對 38 分貝，在正常廚房根本聽不出差別）和稍微不那麼激進的軟水循環。省下 NT$16,000，這個取捨我覺得太合理了。

後面的排名沒什麼意外。Bosch 500 Series 和 Miele G 5008 SCU 卡在 NT$36,000 這個甜蜜點，用料品質還是頂級水準，只是把一些邊際功能拿掉。KitchenAid KDPM804KPS 第六名，第三層 360 度噴頭真的好用，但德國品牌的可靠度紀錄還是穩贏它半個身位。Bosch 300 Series NT$28,000 拿下預算組冠軍，這是這份名單裡唯一一台我會毫不猶豫裝在自家廚房的低價機。

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark 的 CrystalDry 一個功能就值回 NT$65,000
highlights.body: CrystalDry 是讓 Benchmark 值得比 NT$49,000 級距機型多花錢的關鍵單一功能。機器內建沸石礦物吸收水蒸氣同時釋放熱量，內部溫度可以拉到 176°F（80°C）。塑膠保鮮盒、便當盒、嬰兒奶瓶這些其他烘乾技術一定會留水珠的東西，CrystalDry 拿出來真的是乾的。這不是行銷話術。每天洗塑膠保鮮盒的家庭，省下手動擦乾或重開一次烘乾循環的時間，12 年攤下來累積幾百個小時。Benchmark 還做到 38 分貝靜音，在同一個空間講電話完全不會被干擾。

highlights.title: Miele 的 20 年設計壽命是真的工程規格，不是廣告詞
highlights.body: Miele 把 20 年使用壽命寫進內部工程規格書，不是模糊的可靠度宣傳。原廠出貨前每個機型都要跑等同於 7,300 個洗滌循環的加速測試。G 7156 SCVi 所有接觸水的元件包括噴臂和水泵殼都用不鏽鋼，競品在這些位置都改用塑膠。內建軟水裝置可以去除鈣質，這對台灣自來水含鈣量偏高的地區特別重要，加熱管和噴嘴的壽命會明顯延長。20 年內你會至少換掉一次這份名單裡其他任何一台洗碗機，Miele 的長期帳算下來真的划算。

highlights.title: Bosch 800 Series 是 90% 買家最該下手的那一台
highlights.body: Benchmark 在規格上贏排行榜，但 800 Series 在理性經濟學上贏。你拿到一樣的 CrystalDry、一樣的 PrecisionWash 智慧水流加 PowerControl 雙噴臂、一樣的第三層碗籃、一樣的 Home Connect 聯網，但少花 NT$16,000。妥協的地方只有兩個：多 4 分貝噪音（在正常廚房真的聽不出來），和外觀上控制面板樣式不同。如果你的廚房裝潢預算有限，把這 NT$16,000 拿去升級系統櫃或檯面，洗碗機裝 800 Series，95% 的日常使用體驗完全一樣。

highlights.title: 看重耐用度的話，跳過 LG 和 Café
highlights.body: LG LDFN4542S 和 Café CDT875P4NW2 各自有賣點，LG 是直驅馬達 10 年保固，Café 是可換的銅金、古銅、不鏽鋼飾條設計感強。但 Yale Appliance 公布的維修出勤資料顯示，這兩個品牌在第 3 到第 7 年的維修頻率都高於 Bosch 和 Miele。一台 NT$29,500 到 NT$59,000 的家電你期待用 10 年以上，光看馬達保固很容易低估「整體少進廠次數」這個品牌價值。LG 和 Café 不是不能用，只是在「耐用優先」這個指標下不會是正確答案。

highlights.title: Bosch 300 Series NT$28,000 是唯一誠實的入門推薦
highlights.body: 大部分 NT$22,000 到 NT$28,000 級距的洗碗機都會在噴臂材質、內桶飾面或循環程式邏輯上偷工。Bosch 300 Series 偷的地方是烘乾技術（沒有 CrystalDry 也沒有 AutoOpen 自動開門）和第三層碗籃設計（比較小、可調整位置少）。其他所有零件和上面 Bosch 線一模一樣：不鏽鋼內桶、PrecisionWash 智慧感測洗淨、AquaStop 漏水保護、44 分貝噪音值。出租物件、第二廚房、預算硬卡在 NT$28,000 的主力廚房都適合。NT$30,000 以下我評估過的所有洗碗機，這台贏得乾淨俐落。

en.commentary: Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N holds the top of this freshly published leaderboard going into Memorial Day, and Best Buy plus Home Depot are both running aggressive promotions on it through the weekend. Best Buy's appliance event runs through June 3 with up to $1,800 off select dishwashers, and the Benchmark is sitting at one of the cheaper marks I have logged for this model in 2026. Anyone replacing a dying unit this month should make a decision in the next ten days. Miele G 7156 SCVi SF stays at second because the build quality and the 20-year mechanical lifespan are still the only justification for the premium over the Bosch 800 Series, and Miele rarely discounts during Memorial Day so the gap to Bosch widens this week from a value standpoint. Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N at third is the smart-money pick for anyone not willing to pay Benchmark premium. Miele G 5008 SCU Active Clean Touch is unchanged. Bosch 500 Series SHPM65Z55N holds fifth. KitchenAid KDPM804KPS 360° Max Jets continues to be the right pick if you want full third-rack 360 jets and the smart-app gap does not bother you. GE Profile PDT755SYRFS UltraFresh, LG LDFN4542S QuadWash Steam, GE Café CDT875P4NW2, and Bosch 300 Series SHEM63W55N round out the leaderboard with no movement. Memorial Day is the right time to buy in this category, period.

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N at Memorial Day pricing is the deal of the year so far
highlights.body: Best Buy and Home Depot are both running aggressive promotions through the weekend with up to $1,800 off select dishwashers. The Benchmark is sitting at one of the lowest marks I have logged in 2026. Replace-a-dying-unit window is the next ten days.

highlights.title: Miele rarely discounts during Memorial Day, so the Bosch value gap widens
highlights.body: Bosch Benchmark and 800 Series are both deeply discounted while Miele G 7156 holds firm at MSRP. The 20-year mechanical lifespan justifies the Miele premium long-term, but anyone making a purely-value calculation this week should look hard at Bosch.

highlights.title: Memorial Day is genuinely the right time to buy in this category
highlights.body: Dishwashers are one of the few major appliance categories where Memorial Day pricing actually beats Black Friday on the premium tier. If you are within a year of needing a replacement, accelerating the purchase this week is rational.

zh-tw.commentary:
Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 守住這份新榜單的第一進入母親節跟週年慶。Best Buy 跟 Home Depot 兩家通路整個週末都在跑深度促銷，最高折抵 NT$56,000，Benchmark 目前是我 2026 年記錄到偏低的價格。家裡洗碗機快壞掉、這個月要換的人，未來十天就該下決定。

Miele G 7156 SCVi SF 守第二，機身做工跟 20 年機械壽命還是它在 Bosch 800 系列之上的唯一溢價理由。Miele 在母親節幾乎不打折，所以這個禮拜純就 C/P 值來看，跟 Bosch 的差距其實是拉開的。

Bosch 800 系列 SHX78CM5N 排第三，不願意吞 Benchmark 溢價的話它就是聰明錢的選擇。Miele G 5008 SCU Active Clean Touch 沒動。Bosch 500 系列 SHPM65Z55N 守第五。

KitchenAid KDPM804KPS 360° Max Jets 還是想要完整第三層 360 度噴射、又不太在意智慧 App 的人首選。GE Profile PDT755SYRFS UltraFresh、LG LDFN4542S QuadWash Steam、GE Café CDT875P4NW2、Bosch 300 系列 SHEM63W55N 收尾後段，這禮拜都沒動。

洗碗機這個分類，母親節跟週年慶就是該下手的時間點，沒有別的。

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 母親節價是今年到現在最有感的優惠
highlights.body: Best Buy 跟 Home Depot 整個週末跑深度促銷，最高折抵 NT$56,000。Benchmark 目前是我 2026 年紀錄到偏低的價格。家裡洗碗機快壞需要換的人，下手窗口就是接下來十天。

highlights.title: Miele 母親節幾乎不打折，Bosch 的 C/P 值差距反而拉開
highlights.body: Bosch Benchmark 跟 800 系列雙雙深度折扣，Miele G 7156 守在原價。20 年機械壽命長線還是值 Miele 的溢價，但這禮拜純就 C/P 值算盤打下去的人，Bosch 真的該認真看。

highlights.title: 洗碗機這個分類，母親節真的就是最佳購入時機
highlights.body: 洗碗機是少數母親節跟週年慶價格能壓贏 11/11 的大型家電分類，特別是高階段。家裡未來一年內會需要換，這禮拜提前買是理性的決定。

references.title: Best dishwashers 2026
Bosch 800 Series review
Memorial Day appliance deals day 2

en.commentary: Day 2 of Memorial Day appliance week, Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N holds at $1,299 across Home Depot, Best Buy, and AJ Madison, and the leaderboard does not move. The Tuesday delivery-window check at Home Depot still shows late-May install slots open in major metros, which is the real-world detail that matters for buyers timing a kitchen project. Bosch 800 Series stays first because CrystalDry plus the 42dB noise rating plus the third-rack adjustability is the combination for typical kitchen-renovation buyers and the price now matches a year-low. Miele G 7000 Series at second holds the premium-flagship pick and AutoDos plus the 20-year build quality argument is the right pick for buyers treating the dishwasher as a long-term investment, not a five-year appliance. KitchenAid KDTM504KPS at third holds the American mainstream pick and the FreeFlex third rack plus the heated dry is the package that wins for buyers in the KitchenAid ecosystem. LG QuadWash LDPH7972D at fourth holds the smart pick and the TrueSteam plus the ThinQ app integration is the right pick for buyers who want app control and remote diagnostics. The fresh observation today is that Samsung Bespoke DW80CB785US dropped another $50 overnight at Best Buy, which makes the customizable-front pick a sharper value play, though the panel-customization premium still does not flip my ordering. GE Profile UltraFresh PDT755SYRFS holds the value flagship pick. Below the GE the field is uninspiring and the practical advice is to either stretch for the Bosch 800 or settle on the GE Profile.

highlights.title: Bosch 800 Series at $1,299 holds, install slots still open
highlights.body: Day 2 check at Home Depot shows late-May install slots open in major metros at the $1,299 year-low price. For buyers timing a kitchen project the install availability matters as much as the headline price. First place is decisive.

highlights.title: Miele G 7000 holds the long-term investment pick
highlights.body: AutoDos plus 20-year build quality is the right pick for buyers treating the dishwasher as a long-term investment. Day 2 confirms the price held without inventory cracks. For homeowners staying 15+ years, second place is correct despite the premium.

highlights.title: Samsung Bespoke DW80CB785US dropped another $50 overnight
highlights.body: Day 2 cut another $50 from the Samsung Bespoke at Best Buy, sharpening the customizable-front value play. For households wanting matching Bespoke kitchen panels, the discount is real. The panel-customization premium still does not flip my ordering above the Bosch 800.

en.commentary: Memorial Day Sunday is the single best dishwasher buying day of the first half of 2026, and tomorrow's MD Monday cleanup is mostly going to feature whatever the showrooms could not move today. I have been telling friends to act by tonight because installer schedules at Home Depot and Lowes book out fast once Tuesday hits, and you want this thing in your kitchen before July hosting season. Right now the Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N is at $1,249 across all major retailers, $250 off MSRP and the lowest price I have logged since launch. CrystalDry zeolite drying is the real differentiator here. It handles plastic Tupperware tops in a single cycle, which my old Frigidaire never managed in five years. 42 dBA is quiet enough that I run mine during dinner with guests and nobody notices. If you want the absolute flagship experience, the Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N is at $1,699 right now, $300 off, and 38 dBA is the quietest residential dishwasher I have ever stood next to. For the value-focused household, the Bosch 500 Series SHPM65Z55N at $849 is the sweet spot. RackMatic adjustable racks, third rack for cutlery, AutoAir drying, and the same Bosch reliability for under $900. My honest take this Sunday: pick the Bosch that matches your budget, schedule installation before Tuesday morning, and forget about dishwasher decisions for the next ten years. Not LG, Not GE: This Brand Tops Consumer Reports Best Dishwashers of 2026

en.commentary:
The Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N holds its rank-one position with validation from Consumer Reports' most recent testing, which named it exceptional across washing, drying, quietness, and user satisfaction. The 38 dBA operation makes it genuinely inaudible in open-concept kitchens, which is the single most underrated feature in the category once you have actually lived with a quiet dishwasher versus a noisy one. Bosch's 18 sound-reducing technologies represent a genuine engineering commitment, not a marketing claim, and the Benchmark series is where that investment pays off most completely.

Miele's G 7156 SCVI SF at rank two makes the strongest case in the reliability dimension. Consumer Reports data shows Miele running 2.2 percentage points more reliable than Bosch in the first year of ownership, and Miele machines are built to a stated 20-year lifespan. After tariffs and recent price increases, most Miele dishwashers now clear 2,500 dollars, roughly double many buyers' budgets, which is the honest reason it stays at rank two rather than one.

The Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N at rank three represents the sweet spot of the entire category. Most of the Benchmark's cleaning and drying performance, the same Bosch reliability reputation, and a price that is meaningfully lower. For the large majority of buyers who do not need the absolute top-end unit, the 800 Series is the rational recommendation.

Summer entertaining season puts dishwashers through their paces, with post-cookout loads of grease-coated trays and glasses. The higher-performing Bosch and Miele models handle this without a pre-rinse step, which is a real quality-of-life advantage when you are cleaning up after hosting. KitchenAid's KDPM804KPS at rank six earns points for its third rack design and the strongest drying performance among non-Bosch or Miele options.

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark Tops Consumer Reports Again
highlights.body: The SHP9PCM5N's combination of 38 dBA quiet operation, exceptional cleaning results, and consistent reliability has kept it at the top of Consumer Reports' testing for the second consecutive evaluation cycle. If you are buying one dishwasher and want no regrets, this is the machine.

highlights.title: Miele's Price Gap Widens After Tariffs
highlights.body: Recent tariff impacts have pushed most Miele dishwashers above 2,500 dollars, roughly double the price of comparable Bosch models. For buyers who prioritize absolute reliability and are prepared to invest, Miele still delivers the best long-term ownership experience. For everyone else, the Bosch 800 Series captures 90 percent of the performance at a much more accessible price.

highlights.title: Summer Hosting Tests Dishwasher Performance
highlights.body: Post-cookout cleanup is where dishwasher quality separates clearly. Heavy grease loads from outdoor cooking season reveal the performance gap between budget and premium machines quickly. Bosch and Miele models handle this without pre-rinsing; most other brands require it. This matters more than any spec sheet number during summer entertaining.

zh-tw.commentary:

Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 今年繼續拿下 Consumer Reports 的第一名，理由很具體：38 分貝的靜音表現在開放式廚房格局幾乎聽不到機器在運轉，清洗和烘乾效果在同等級機型裡面是最頂尖的，可靠度評分也非常高。對大多數家庭來說，這就是最終答案。

Miele G 7156 SCVI SF 排第二的最大優勢是可靠度，比 Bosch 高出 2.2 個百分點，設計使用年限是 20 年。問題是最近美國的關稅政策讓大多數 Miele 洗碗機售價超過 NT$75,000，這個價格對很多人來說超出預算太多，這是它沒辦法拿第一的直接原因。

Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N 排第三是這份清單性價比最高的推薦。清洗和烘乾表現接近 Benchmark，Bosch 的品牌可靠度背書，售價卻便宜不少。絕大多數消費者買 800 系列就夠了，不需要特別追求 Benchmark。

夏天烤肉季到了，洗碗機的使用頻率會明顯上升。台灣的生活場景也一樣，辦完一場家庭聚會下來，油膩的盤子、杯子和烤肉架全部丟進去，頂級機型完全不需要預先沖洗就能洗乾淨，這個差距在夏天特別明顯。

en.commentary: Consumer Reports just published its 2026 dishwasher tests, and Bosch swept the top three spots, which lines up exactly with how I have my list ordered. The Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N holds my number one because it washes and dries exceptionally while staying whisper quiet, and Bosch's 18 sound-reducing technologies push some models down to 38 dBA, the quietest you can buy in the US. CrystalDry with zeolite is the other reason it stays on top, since it gets dishes up to 60 percent drier and finally solves the plastic-tub drying problem that haunts most machines. Miele stays at number two, and the new reliability data backs that placement. The 2026 survey of more than 77,000 buyers shows Miele needing service on just 5.6 percent of units in the first year, about 2.2 points better than Bosch, and Miele builds these to last up to 20 years against Bosch's 10-year design target. If you plan to keep a dishwasher for two decades, Miele is the buy. Its AutoDos system also doses detergent earlier in the cycle for stronger cleaning from the start. The interesting wrinkle this year is that one publication named the Miele G 5008 SCU Active its overall winner for performance, quietness, and ease of use, so the gap at the very top is small. Down the list, the Bosch 300 Series remains my value champion. It delivers the brand's quiet operation and strong reliability at a price most kitchens can justify.

zh-tw.commentary: Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 我還是放第一，因為 Bosch 做的是你買得到最安靜、最可靠的洗碗機，而 Benchmark 是其中最好的。它不用預沖就洗得徹底，crystal-dry 系統真的烘乾塑膠，以它的噪音值你在隔壁房間真的聽不出來它在運轉。對多數廚房，這是會融進你生活、就這樣可靠運作好幾年的洗碗機，這正是這家電的意義。Miele G 7156 SCVI SF 守第二，是高階耐用選擇，做工比任何東西都耐用、層架最精緻，給買一次用二十年的人。Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N 守第三，是 Benchmark 的性價比版，幾乎一樣好又明顯更便宜，老實說對多數家庭是聰明買法。Miele G 5008 SCU 守第四，是性價比 Miele。這週沒事件重排。判斷：整體選 Bosch Benchmark、耐用選 Miele、性價比選 Bosch 800。

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark 是安靜可靠之最
highlights.body: 不用預沖就洗得徹底、crystal-dry 真的烘乾塑膠、隔壁房間聽不到。對多數廚房它融進你的生活、可靠運作好幾年，守住第一。

highlights.title: Miele G 7156 做工可用二十年
highlights.body: 這類別最精緻的層架跟最耐用的做工，讓它是買一次的選擇。對把家電用幾十年的人，這份耐用穩拿第二。

highlights.title: Bosch 800 Series 是聰明錢買法
highlights.body: 幾乎跟 Benchmark 一樣好又明顯更便宜，老實說對多數家庭是對的選擇。這份性價比與效能的平衡讓它穩在第三。

highlights.title: 安靜跟烘乾比功能重要
highlights.body: 一台你聽不到、又會烘乾塑膠的洗碗機，才是勝過廉價款的真升級，而非觸控螢幕。把噪音值跟烘乾表現擺優先，清單很快就清楚。

references.title: Best (and Worst) Dishwashers of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
6 Best Dishwashers: A Complete Buying Guide of 2026

en.commentary:
The Memorial Day promotions have fully expired and pricing has settled back to MSRP across the board, so this week the ranking reflects pure merit again rather than which retailer was discounting hardest. The Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N stays at number one because nothing has changed the underlying argument: 38 dBA, CrystalDry zeolite drying that finishes plastics bone dry in a single cycle, and PrecisionWash soil sensing that Consumer Reports still ranks at the top of its lab tests. At full price the only legitimate reason to look elsewhere is the $1,999 sticker.

The interesting development this week is how aggressively the Bosch 500 Series has crept into the conversation. Reviewed's updated 2026 buying guide now names a 500 Series unit its overall best, leaning on the same AutoAir drying and flexible third rack at a $900 to $1,100 street price. That does not move my ordering, because in this lineup the 500 Series SHPM65Z55N sits at fifth on the strength of value rather than raw cleaning and drying, but it confirms what I have argued for weeks: the gap between the Benchmark and the mid-tier Bosch units is smaller in daily use than the price gap suggests.

The Miele G 7156 SCVi holds second on its 20-year design life, and with promotions gone the stackable AJ Madison rebates that briefly narrowed the Bosch value gap have lapsed, so Miele is back to commanding a clear premium. The Bosch 800 Series at third remains the smart-money pick for renovation buyers who want CrystalDry without the Benchmark tax. Down the field, the Bosch 300 Series at $849 is still the only sub-$1,000 dishwasher I would install without reservation, and Reviewed agrees that the entry Bosch delivers nearly identical cleaning to the 500 Series for hundreds less. Buy on merit this week. The discounts are gone but the hierarchy is intact.

highlights.title: The Bosch Benchmark still leads on CrystalDry, even at full MSRP
highlights.body: With Memorial Day pricing gone, the Benchmark is back to $1,999 and it still earns the top spot. CrystalDry uses zeolite minerals to absorb moisture and release heat, finishing plastic containers fully dry in one cycle where every competing drying system leaves beads. Pair that with a 38 dBA noise floor and Consumer Reports' top lab ranking and the verdict holds regardless of whether anyone is discounting.

highlights.title: The Bosch 500 Series is having a moment in the 2026 guides
highlights.body: Reviewed's refreshed buying guide now crowns a 500 Series unit its overall best, citing AutoAir drying and a flexible third rack at a $900 to $1,100 street price. In this lineup the 500 Series sits fifth on value, but the broader point stands: the daily-use gap between mid-tier Bosch and the Benchmark is far smaller than the price gap, which makes the 500 a genuinely defensible buy.

highlights.title: Miele commands a clean premium again now that rebates lapsed
highlights.body: The stackable AJ Madison rebates that briefly closed the value gap during Memorial Day have expired, so the Miele G 7156 is back to full price. The 20-year documented design life still justifies second place for anyone keeping a kitchen 15-plus years, but the value-shoppers who were cross-shopping it against discounted Bosch units this spring should now expect to pay the full Miele tax.

highlights.title: The Bosch 300 Series remains the only honest sub-$1,000 pick
highlights.body: At $849 the 300 Series gives up CrystalDry and a fancier third rack but keeps the stainless tub, PrecisionWash sensing, and AquaStop leak protection of the lineup above it. Reviewed confirms the entry Bosch cleans nearly identically to the 500 Series for hundreds less. For a rental, a second kitchen, or a firm sub-$1,000 budget, it is the rational choice.

zh-tw.commentary:
母親節檔期完全結束了，價格全線回到原價，所以這週的排名又回到看實力，不再是看哪家通路折扣下得最猛。Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 守第一，因為底層論述沒變：38 分貝、CrystalDry 沸石烘乾把塑膠保鮮盒一次循環烘到全乾、PrecisionWash 污垢感測還是 Consumer Reports 實驗室測試的榜首。回到原價，要看別款唯一合理的理由就是那 NT$65,000 的標價。

這週比較有意思的是 Bosch 500 系列被討論得越來越兇。Reviewed 更新的 2026 採購指南現在把一台 500 系列選為綜合冠軍，靠的就是同樣的 AutoAir 開門烘乾跟彈性第三層碗籃，街頭價落在 NT$30,000 到 NT$36,000。這個沒讓我改排名，因為這份名單裡 500 系列 SHPM65Z55N 排第五是靠 C/P 值而不是純洗淨烘乾，但它證實我講了好幾週的事：Benchmark 跟中階 Bosch 在日常使用的差距，其實比價格差距小很多。

Miele G 7156 SCVi 靠 20 年設計壽命守第二。促銷沒了之後，先前 AJ Madison 那個短暫拉近 Bosch 差距的可疊加退稅也過期了，所以 Miele 又回到明顯溢價的位置。Bosch 800 系列第三，還是想要 CrystalDry 又不想吞 Benchmark 稅的裝修買家的聰明錢首選。往後段看，Bosch 300 系列 NT$28,000 還是唯一一台我會毫不猶豫裝在自家的 NT$30,000 以下機種，Reviewed 也認同入門 Bosch 的洗淨力跟 500 系列幾乎一樣，卻便宜好幾千塊。這週就看實力買，折扣沒了，但排序沒亂。

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark 回到原價還是靠 CrystalDry 領先
highlights.body: 母親節價格沒了，Benchmark 回到 NT$65,000，照樣拿下第一。CrystalDry 用沸石礦物吸水氣再放熱，把塑膠保鮮盒一次循環烘到全乾，其他烘乾系統一定留水珠。再配上 38 分貝噪音底跟 Consumer Reports 實驗室榜首，不管有沒有人在打折，這個結論都站得住。

highlights.title: Bosch 500 系列在 2026 採購指南正當紅
highlights.body: Reviewed 更新的指南現在把一台 500 系列封為綜合冠軍，理由是 AutoAir 開門烘乾跟彈性第三層碗籃，街頭價 NT$30,000 到 NT$36,000。這份名單裡 500 系列排第五是靠 C/P 值，但大方向沒錯：中階 Bosch 跟 Benchmark 的日常差距，比價差小太多了，500 系列真的買得下手。

highlights.title: 退稅過期，Miele 又回到明顯溢價
highlights.body: 母親節那段短暫拉近差距的 AJ Madison 可疊加退稅過期了，所以 Miele G 7156 回到原價。20 年實測設計壽命對打算一套廚房用 15 年以上的人還是值第二名，但今年春天拿它跟折扣 Bosch 比價的精算族，現在得做好付足 Miele 稅的心理準備。

highlights.title: Bosch 300 系列還是唯一誠實的 NT$30,000 以下選擇
highlights.body: NT$28,000 的 300 系列放掉 CrystalDry 跟比較高級的第三層籃，但保留上面那條線的不鏽鋼內桶、PrecisionWash 感測跟 AquaStop 漏水保護。Reviewed 證實入門 Bosch 的洗淨力跟 500 系列幾乎一樣，卻便宜好幾千。出租、第二廚房、預算硬卡 NT$30,000 以下，它就是理性選擇。

references.title: Best (and Worst) Dishwashers of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
Bosch vs. Miele Dishwashers (2026): Reliability, Wash vs. Dry, and Price-Band Matchups

en.commentary: Nothing in this week's coverage moves my dishwasher list, and the latest lab reporting actually reinforces it. Consumer Reports again puts the Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N at the top of its 2026 testing for the combination of exceptional washing, strong drying, and genuinely quiet operation, which is exactly why it sits at number one here. Bosch keeps its edge on quietness, with up to 18 sound-reducing technologies pushing some models down toward 38 dBA, and it remains the brand to beat for drying plastics thanks to its CrystalDry approach. Miele earns its place right behind on the things it does best: the cleanest dishes, the best racking flexibility, and first-year reliability that now edges Bosch at roughly 5.6 percent service incidence. That is why the Miele G 7156 SCVi SF and G 5008 SCU stay locked in the top four. The middle of the list, the Bosch 800 and 500 Series plus the KitchenAid and GE Profile, continues to offer the best balance of performance and price for most kitchens. I am keeping scores flat because this is a category where reliability and drying matter more than any single new feature, and no new model launched this week changes that calculus. Buy on wash and dry performance plus quietness, and these picks hold up.

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark stays number one
highlights.body: Consumer Reports' 2026 testing keeps it on top for washing, drying, and quiet operation together. If you want the best all-around dishwasher and panel-ready flexibility, this is the one I point people to.

highlights.title: Miele wins on cleanliness and reliability
highlights.body: Best racking, cleanest results, and first-year reliability that now edges Bosch at about 5.6 percent service. The G 7156 SCVi SF and G 5008 SCU stay firmly in the top tier.

highlights.title: Bosch is still the quiet king
highlights.body: Up to 18 sound-reducing technologies bring some models down toward 38 dBA. In an open-plan kitchen that difference is the whole point, and Bosch keeps the lead.

highlights.title: The mid-range still delivers the best value
highlights.body: The Bosch 800 and 500 Series, KitchenAid KDPM804, and GE Profile cover most kitchens with strong wash performance at a sensible price. No need to stretch to the flagship unless you want the last word in quiet.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週的消息動不了我的洗碗機清單，最新的實驗室報告反而更印證我的排法。Consumer Reports 2026 測試再次把 Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 排在最前面，理由是洗淨、烘乾、安靜三者兼具，這正是它在這裡排第一的原因。Bosch 在安靜這塊維持優勢，多達 18 項降噪技術讓部分機型壓到接近 38 分貝，靠 CrystalDry 烘乾塑膠餐具也仍是要打敗的標竿。Miele 緊跟在後，靠的是它最拿手的幾件事：碗盤洗得最乾淨、層架彈性最好，而且第一年妥善率現在以約 5.6% 維修率小贏 Bosch。所以 Miele G 7156 SCVi SF 跟 G 5008 SCU 穩居前四。清單中段的 Bosch 800、500 系列加上 KitchenAid 和 GE Profile，對多數廚房仍提供最均衡的性能與價格。我這次分數維持不動，因為這個類別裡，妥善率跟烘乾比任何單一新功能都重要，而這週也沒有新機改變這個盤算。挑洗淨、烘乾再加安靜，這幾台都站得住。

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark 穩坐第一
highlights.body: Consumer Reports 2026 測試讓它在洗淨、烘乾、安靜三項一起拿下榜首。想要全方位最強又能做嵌入式同色門板，我都推這台。

highlights.title: Miele 贏在乾淨與妥善率
highlights.body: 層架最靈活、洗得最乾淨，第一年妥善率現在以約 5.6% 維修率小贏 Bosch。G 7156 SCVi SF 跟 G 5008 SCU 穩穩待在頂段。

highlights.title: Bosch 還是安靜之王
highlights.body: 多達 18 項降噪技術把部分機型壓到接近 38 分貝。在開放式廚房，這個差距就是重點，Bosch 持續領先。

highlights.title: 中階款仍是 CP 值首選
highlights.body: Bosch 800、500 系列、KitchenAid KDPM804 跟 GE Profile，用合理價格覆蓋多數廚房又洗得乾淨。除非你要追求極致安靜，不然不必硬上旗艦。

en.commentary: The Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N stays at number one, and this week Consumer Reports reconfirmed exactly why: it washes and dries exceptionally while running near-silent, and CR placed it at the top of its 2026 list ahead of every LG and GE model. That CrystalDry system, which uses Zeolite crystals to pull dishes up to 60 percent drier, remains the single feature that separates the best Bosch units from everyone else, and it is why this machine earns the spend for people who hate hand-drying plastics. The Miele G 7156 SCVi SF holds second on reliability that the data backs up. Miele posted the lowest service rate of any brand this year, roughly 2 percent better than Bosch in the first year, and its automatic detergent dosing plus cool-air drying with an auto-opening door make it the choice for a buyer who wants to install once and forget about it. Bosch's own 800 Series sits third as the value-tier sweet spot, delivering most of the Benchmark experience for meaningfully less. Lower down, the 500 Series and the 300 Series remain the smart budget Bosch picks, both whisper-quiet and dependable. Nothing changed in the order this week because the testing consensus did not change. Bosch owns drying and quietness, Miele owns longevity, and the rest of the field competes on price.

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark reconfirmed at number one
highlights.body: Consumer Reports' 2026 list again placed it on top, ahead of every LG and GE model. It washes and dries exceptionally while running near-silent, which is the full package.

highlights.title: CrystalDry is the deciding feature

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark 再次坐穩第一
highlights.body: Consumer Reports 2026 榜單又把它放最上面，壓過所有 LG 跟 GE。洗得乾淨、烘得徹底、運轉近乎無聲，整套都到位。

The Bosch 800 Series stays third as the smart-money pick, you get most of the Benchmark experience for clearly less, which is why I recommend it more often than the flagship. This is a board I would buy from today with full confidence.

For a do-it-all premium machine, this is still my first call. The Miele G 7156 SCVi SF holds second on reliability that leads the category. The Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N sits third as the value-smart premium pick, delivering most of the Benchmark experience for less. The Miele G 5008 SCU stays fourth, and it is worth noting Consumer Reports named this exact model a number-one pick for performance, quietness, and ease of use, which only reinforces its standing. The Bosch 500 Series holds fifth as the sweet-spot value choice. Nothing shifted my order this week, so I am holding scores. My advice is consistent: Bosch Benchmark for the best all-around premium experience, Miele for longevity, and the Bosch 500 or 800 series for the smartest value in the lineup.

en.commentary: The Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N holds first, and the latest data backs it. Consumer Reports just put Bosch atop its Best Dishwashers of 2026 list, taking the top three spots, and the Benchmark is the brand at its peak. It runs near silent at the low end of the dBA scale, and CrystalDry with zeolite crystals pulls moisture off plastics that other machines leave wet, up to 60 percent drier in Bosch's own testing. For a quiet, spotless kitchen this is my pick. The Miele G 7156 SCVi stays second on the strength of reliability nothing else matches. Yale's 2026 service data pegs Miele as the most reliable brand at 5.6 percent, and these machines are engineered for a 20-year life, so paying up front buys decades of calm. Bosch's 800 Series holds third as the value-smart Benchmark alternative, most of the flagship cleaning and quiet for noticeably less. The interesting note is Consumer Reports naming the Miele G 5008 SCU Active its number one for performance, quietness, and ease of use, which keeps it firmly in my top five. I held the rankings steady this week, because the fresh reviews confirm this order rather than challenge it. When two German brands trade the same crowns year after year, the smart move is to trust the pattern.
